---
title: "About Me"
---

I live in New York City with my wife Alyssa, our daughter, and our dog Dempsey.
When not doing science, I love exploring the city and surrounding area:
off-leash hours in Central Park (Dempsey's favorite), trying new restaurants,
reading books in coffee shops, running, seeing movies, etc. I'm also an avid
reader, music fan/critic (OK, borderline snob), and gardener and an aspiring
bass guitarist.

![Alyssa, Dempsey and me in Cape Cod in 2014.](images/cape_cod_2014.jpg){width=300px fig-alt="Alyssa, Dempsey and me in Cape Cod in 2014"}

![Return trip almost exactly 5 years later!](images/cape_cod_2019.jpg){width=600px fig-alt="Alyssa, Dempsey and me in Cape Cod in 2019"}
